description: Static HTML website for T4 Tour & Travel LLP, featuring Himalayas, Char Dham & North India travel packages.

structure.index.html: Main single-page website with all sections (nav, hero, packages, about, contact)

conventions.css: CSS custom properties (variables) defined in :root, inline styles within <style> tag
conventions.fonts: Playfair Display (serif), DM Sans (sans-serif), DM Mono (monospace) via Google Fonts
